title: verbascum × degenianum
intro: Verbascum × degenianum, also known as Verbascum × degenianum, is a hybrid plant in the family Scrophulariaceae, derived from the cross between Verbascum phoeniceum and Verbascum lychnitis. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to soothe and calm irritated skin and mucous membranes, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for coughs and colds. The health benefits of Verbascum × degenianum include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce swelling and combat infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
